---
title: "Assignment 2 - February 17th, 2026 - Work in Progress"
subtitle: "Knowledge Mining"
format: html
---

# Prompt Exercise

## Prompt Creation

Task: Write a baseline prompt to request a structured systematic literature review on data mining and machine learning applications.

My Prompt: “Conduct a 2,000-word structured, systematic literature review on the applications of data mining and machine learning in state surveillance and the oppression of marginalized populations. Include a methodology section, synthesize key findings, identify trends and gaps, and propose one testable hypothesis. Use an academic tone and emulate systematic review standards.”

Prompt was submitted to ChatGPT, Copilot, and Grok 3, and raw outputs collected.

## ChatGPT Response

### Raw Response

<details>

<summary><strong>Or Click to Show/Hide Response</strong></summary>

<iframe src="6323-A2-ChatResponse.pdf" width="100%" height="800px" style="border: none; margin-top: 1em;">

</iframe>

</details>

## Copilot Response

### Raw Response

<details>

<summary><strong>Or Click to Show/Hide Response</strong></summary>

<iframe src="6323-A2-CopilotResponse.pdf" width="100%" height="800px" style="border: none; margin-top: 1em;">

</iframe>

</details>

## Grok 3 Response

### Raw Response

<details>

<summary><strong>Or Click to Show/Hide Response</strong></summary>

<iframe src="6323-A2-GrokResponse.pdf" width="100%" height="800px" style="border: none; margin-top: 1em;">

</iframe>

</details>
